subject: A massive cresting ocean wave breaking against weathered stone ruins or cliffs beneath a star-filled night sky
description: A monumental dark blue wave curls and crashes against jagged stone ruins or coastal rocks in the foreground, foam catching pale moonlight. The sky above is a deep cosmic blue dense with scattered stars and faint nebular wisps, suggesting the heavens themselves are being witnessed at the moment of the wave's strike. The composition is pure scene with no figures — a Theros-flavored vision of divine cosmic power erupting against earthly stone. The palette is almost monochromatically blue, from near-black depths in the wave's trough to silver-white starlight at the crests.
foreground: Cresting dark wave breaking against stone ruins / coastal rocks with foam catching light
background: Star-filled cosmic night sky with nebular haze
emotion: no figures; the scene reads as awe-inspiring, overwhelming, sublime cosmic force
